positive: A stylized, symmetrical geometric design featuring a mythical forest owl perched on a crescent moon silhouette. The scene utilizes Art Deco influences mixed with celestial vaporwave aesthetics. The composition must be highly contrasted, featuring deep indigo blues and vibrant metallic gold accents (gold foil effect texture), complemented by ethereal pastel teal and lavender gradients. The owl should have sharp, stylized plumage and wide, watchful eyes. The composition must be centered and suitable for a full-chest print on apparel. Include subtle starry constellations subtly woven into the background gradient. Strong volumetric lighting from the moon, deep shadows, ultra-detailed line work, flat illustration style mixed with photorealistic texture details, vector art quality.
